results.title: UPCL officials engage with consumers to dispel myths about smart meters
results.description: Garhwal Post Bureau Mussoorie, 12 Jul: Uttarakhand Power Corporation Limited (UPCL) has launched a special public outreach campaign in Mussoorie with the aim of establishing direct dialogue with electricity consumers, resolving their issues, and assessing the actual status of power services. Acting on the instructions of Managing Director PC Dhyani, senior officials from the corporate [...]

results.title: AI Jobs Offer Higher Salaries in India, Yet 54% of AI Workers Are Not Seeing Any Pay Hike
results.description: The inaugural Indeed AI at Work Tracker 2026 reveals that while Indian employers offer higher salaries to attract AI talent, 54% of AI-exposed employees report stagnant or lower pay. India's AI hiring boom is driving higher salaries for new talent, but many existing AI professionals are yet to see the financial benefits.

results.title: Everyone expected a phone, but OpenAI’s first device is a ChatGPT-powered speaker that moves
results.description: OpenAI is building a portable, screenless speaker pitched internally as “a humanlike AI companion that lives in the home.” It’ll do the usual smart-speaker things—control your appliances, play music, answer questions, handle messages—all running on ChatGPT. The catch is what OpenAI wants it to feel like. The device incorporates mechanical parts that shift on their own, creating the sense that it’s alive rather than a box waiting to be told what to do, according to Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman. It’s still in development. OpenAI is aiming to reveal it later this year and ship it in 2027, as the first of [...]

results.title: Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450 gets costlier: Check new prices
results.description: Royal Enfield has increased the Guerrilla 450 motorcycle prices in India. The price hike affects all variants, ranging from Rs 1,869 to Rs 2,044. Mechanically, the motorcycle remains unchanged with its existing engine and features. Buyers will now pay slightly more for the same motorcycle. The Guerrilla 450 continues with its 452cc engine and TFT instrument console.

results.description: A U.S.-Russian space crew has arrived at the International Space Station for an eight-month mission
